creator: ota@j.email.ne.jp
text:
top has been reporting twice as high as actual transaction for swap-in and swap-out.

Swap: 2048M Total, 201M Used, 1847M Free, 9% Inuse, 27M Out

In this line, top reported 27M Out.  However, systat -vm only shows 13.5 MB transaction for the same period to the device.

We need 3 terminals to observe:
term1 % top
term2 % systatm -vm 1
term3 % swapon <large-device>
term3 % mount -t tmpfs tmpfs /mnt/tmp
term3 % dd if=/dev/zero of=/mnt/tmp/large.txt bs=1M count=3000

Also Having 1 swap device makes easier to observe.
